channel.title: Authors on Christopher J. Schmank
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Christopher J. Schmank

item.description: Christopher J. Schmank is a PhD graduate student at Claremont Graduate University studying under the supervision of Andrew R.A. Conway, PhD. His research interests include statistical modeling techniques like latent variable modeling and psychometric network analysis as well as the imnpact of psychosocial stress on language production and general cognitive abilities.
